name: espressif-esp32-c3
description: Espressif ESP32-C3 family with baseline GPTimer, LEDC PWM, and SAR ADC adapter coverage.
notes: Family level primarily handles identification and knowledge references; real executable bindings live at the esp32-c3 device level.
Base parameter models added for LEDC, GPTimer, and SAR ADC; future expansion planned for GPIO matrix, RMT, UART, I2C, SPI, TWAI.
